with:
  # Build a compact sentence per mission combining operator, crew, commander and backup pilot
      for mission, roles in mission_info.items():
          operator = operator_map.get(mission)
  
          # Helper to prepend nationality adjective if available
          def name_with_nat(name: str) -> str:
              nat = nationality_map.get(name)
              return f"{nat} {name}".strip() if nat else name
  
          crew_names = [name_with_nat(n) for n in roles["crew"]]
          commander_names = [name_with_nat(n) for n in roles["commander"]]
          backup_names = [name_with_nat(n) for n in roles["backupPilot"]]
  
          parts: list[str] = []
  
          # Main clause about crew members
          if crew_names:
              crew_str = join_names(crew_names)
              if operator:
                  main_clause = f"{crew_str} crewed the {operator}'s {mission}"
              else:
                  main_clause = f"{crew_str} crewed the {mission}"
              parts.append(main_clause)
  
          # Commander clause
          if commander_names:
              cmd_str = join_names(commander_names)
              parts.append(f"with {cmd_str} as commander")
  
          # Backup pilot clause
  ... (7 more lines)
